description: Generates connectors between areas in ancient, primeval forest environments. Use when characters move through old-growth forests with a sense of timelessness.

descriptionTranslations.en: Generates connectors between areas in ancient, primeval forest environments. Use when characters move through old-growth forests with a sense of timelessness.

entries.result: Have to push past a collection of boulders

resultTranslations.en: Have to push past a collection of boulders

entries.result: Have to climb down something simple, like a small embankment

resultTranslations.en: Have to climb down something simple, like a small embankment

entries.description: Instead of a Connector, the Area your Character is leaving leads directly to another Area.

descriptionTranslations.en: Instead of a Connector, the Area your Character is leaving leads directly to another Area.

entries.description: The Connector is what you would most expect it to be given the current context.

descriptionTranslations.en: The Connector is what you would most expect it to be given the current context.

entries.description: The Connector is the same as the last Connector you generated. If this is the first Connector, treat as Expected.

descriptionTranslations.en: The Connector is the same as the last Connector you generated. If this is the first Connector, treat as Expected.

entries.description: Roll on the Descriptions Meaning Tables for inspiration on what this Connector could be. Allow this result to give you something unusual.
